name: Allied Cash Advance
description_short: Peoria, AZ's Allied Cash Advance at Center at Arrowhead offers quick payday and title loans weekdays.
description_long:
The Allied Cash Advance location at Center at Arrowhead in Peoria, AZ is a standalone storefront specializing in short-term payday loans and title loans. The branch is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 5PM, closed weekends. This Peoria location serves residents and workers across the area who need quick cash access.

At this Peoria, AZ branch, customers can apply for payday loans, title loans, and related financial services. The friendly staff can answer questions about loan terms, eligibility requirements, and the application process. To speak with someone directly about your options, call the Peoria location at +1 480-691-2997.

If you need emergency cash before your next paycheck, this Peoria storefront provides a straightforward alternative to overdraft fees or credit cards. Bring a government-issued ID, proof of income, and a recent bank statement for a faster application. Allied Cash Advance serves Arizona communities as a direct alternative to traditional banking.
address: Center at Arrowhead, Peoria Center at Arrowhead, 16165 N 83rd Ave Ste 243, Peoria, AZ 85382

company_info.headquarters: Center at Arrowhead, Peoria Center at Arrowhead, 16165 N 83rd Ave Ste 243, Peoria, AZ 85382

pros: Same-day funding available via debit card for in-store applicants; next-day for online
No explicit credit score requirement; will consider applicants with bad or no credit
Fixed installment repayment schedule (not balloon-payment payday structure)
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, and phone
Extended hours including Saturday (10 AM–2 PM) for convenience
Fast approval process (typically 30 minutes with debit card at location)
4.9-star Google rating based on 379 customer reviews
cons: No APR, fee structure, or loan limit transparency disclosed on website
Cannot advise on credit score impact; applicant responsibility to assess damage
Requires active checking account (minimum 30 days old) plus proof of income
Requires vehicle ownership proof in Arizona (additional barrier)
High-cost lending product; rates likely substantially above traditional bank loans
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit who need emergency cash within 24 hours
Unbanked or underbanked individuals with valid checking accounts
Borrowers needing installment structure rather than lump-sum payday loans
diagnosis: Allied Cash Advance is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who cannot access traditional credit and need cash within hours. Critical caveat: this is high-cost credit with non-transparent pricing; applicants must obtain full APR and fee details before committing and should only use as a last resort for true emergencies.
services: Unsecured installment loans with fixed repayment schedules
Retail refinancing and reloading for existing customers
In-store customer service and loan counseling
meta_description: Allied Cash Advance at Center at Arrowhead, Peoria, AZ. Quick payday and title loans, Mon-Fri 9AM-5PM.
